## Type of change

- [ ] Research / methodology doc (under `000-docs/` or `research/`)
- [ ] New experiment sandbox (under `sandboxes/`)
- [ ] Reusable script (under `scripts/`)
- [ ] Documentation fix
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] Branch follows `feat/...` / `fix/...` / `docs/...` / `research/...` / `chore/...` naming
- [ ] If adding a sandbox, includes a `REPORT.md`
- [ ] If adding methodology, references at least one empirical sandbox run or external citation
- [ ] No partner-engagement-specific details exposed publicly
